Marie Cowser Memorial Park - Auburn Avenue NE

Large apple tree with lots of fruit in Marie Cowser Memorial Park, on Auburn Avenue near the intersection with Randolph Street. Picked an apple from the tree in June (yeah, too early), but it was actually pretty good.
